---
title: "Parallel"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---
# Question 1

```{r}

#install.packages("doParallel")

library(doParallel)

library(kableExtra)

library(tibble)

library(dplyr)

#Creating threads 
c1 = makeCluster(4)

#Assigning threads
registerDoParallel(c1)

#Serial
system.time({
  result = foreach(i = 1:100, .combine = "rbind") %do% {
    s = rexp(100, 1)
    resultrow = c(mean(s), var(s))
  }
})
result

#Parallel
system.time({
  result = foreach(i = 1:100, .combine = "rbind") %dopar% {
    s = rexp(100, 1)
    resultrow = c(mean(s), var(s))
  }
})


tibbleResults = as.data.frame(result) |> rename(Mean = V1, Variance = V2)
tibbleResults
```
